description_long: This is a mid-rise apartment building with a flat roof and a brick exterior, featuring a prominent mural of a woman's face and colorful graffiti on its walls. The structure has three stories, with regularly spaced rectangular windows and a few windows covered or boarded up. On one side, there are two black metal balconies, and the rear of the building opens onto a small, partially paved parking area with visible trash and debris. Rooftop HVAC units and vents are present, and the building's corners are accented with white trim. The overall appearance suggests an urban setting, possibly in a neighborhood with a mix of residential and street art influences. The building's surfaces show signs of weathering and urban use, with graffiti and some grime visible.
description: A three-story brick apartment building with a flat roof, street art murals, graffiti, and metal balconies, set in an urban environment with a small rear parking area.
description_view_0: The front view shows a large mural of a woman's face, two black metal balconies, and several windows, with the brick facade as the main feature.
description_view_1: This side view displays more windows, colorful graffiti, and a simpler brick wall without balconies or murals.
description_view_2: The rear view reveals a small parking area with trash, a 'GET OUT' graffiti tag, and fewer windows, some of which are covered.
description_view_3: This view shows the building's L-shape, additional rooftop units, and the parking area extending along the back, with minimal decoration.
attribute_window_arrangement: Windows are arranged in a regular, grid-like pattern with even spacing across each floor, though some are covered or boarded up. The arrangement is mostly symmetrical on the main facades.
